headlines.text: Trump says Iran war is 'very close to over' as US naval blockade enters Day 3
Pakistan army chief flies to Tehran to broker second round of US-Iran peace talks
S&P 500 sneaks toward all-time high of 7,002 as markets shrug off war jitters
It's Tax Day: average refund up 11% to $3,500 thanks to Trump's 'One Big Beautiful Bill'
Trump threatens to fire Fed Chair Powell if he doesn't leave when his term expires next month
Lebanon and Israel hold first direct diplomatic talks in decades in Washington DC
Gas prices hit $4.12 national average — highest since August 2022 — thanks to Hormuz blockade
Eric Swalwell faces 5th sexual misconduct allegation; lawmakers call on him to resign from Congress
Lena Dunham's memoir 'Famesick' out now, spills on Adam Driver chair-throwing and cheating on Jack Antonoff
Hampshire College announces it will finally close at end of fall 2026 semester

breaking.text: CENTCOM: US blockade of Iranian ports 'fully implemented' — Iran threatens to shut down Red Sea shipping in retaliation

stories.hed: Trump Says War 'Very Close to Over' as Blockade Fully Bites and Pakistan Plays Matchmaker Again
stories.dek: The US naval blockade is now 'fully implemented,' having turned back six vessels in its first 24 hours, while Iran threatens to shut down Red Sea shipping if it continues. Trump, ever the optimist, says a deal is imminent and that China has pinky-promised not to send Tehran any more weapons.

stories.hed: Lebanon and Israel Sit Down Together in Washington for First Time in Decades
stories.dek: In a genuinely historic moment, Lebanese and Israeli ambassadors held direct talks in DC for over two hours, with Secretary of State Rubio calling it a 'historic opportunity.' Lebanon wants a ceasefire; Israel wants Hezbollah gone. Classic negotiation.

stories.hed: Happy Tax Day: Refunds Are Up, Powell's Job Is Down, and Senate Republicans Are Deeply Divided on Iran War Funding
stories.dek: The IRS says average refunds are up 11% to $3,500 this year, boosted by Trump's new deductions for tips, overtime, and car loans. Meanwhile, Senate Republicans are fighting over whether to fund a war with no end in sight, and Trump is openly threatening to fire the Fed chair on live TV.

stories.hed: Swalwell Out of California Governor's Race and Possibly Congress Too After 5th Misconduct Allegation
stories.dek: Eric Swalwell dropped his California gubernatorial bid after sexual misconduct allegations piled up, and now multiple colleagues are calling for his congressional resignation as well. In an already chaotic 2026 midterm landscape, Democrats are scrambling to keep their eyes on economic messaging.

stories.hed: Trump vs. Pope Leo XIV Is the Culture War Nobody Asked For but Everyone Is Getting
stories.dek: Pope Leo XIV called the US-Israel war in Iran a product of a 'delusion of omnipotence,' and Trump fired back on social media calling the Pope 'too liberal and weak on crime.' A sitting US president is currently beefing with the Pope on the internet, and somehow this is just a Wednesday.

markets.context: Markets near all-time highs as Iran peace talk optimism and strong bank earnings from Morgan Stanley and BofA offset Dow drag from energy stocks.

gas.note: Filling up your tank now costs roughly what a therapy session used to — and you need both.

popCulture.hed: Lena Dunham's Memoir 'Famesick' Drops Bombshells on Adam Driver, Jack Antonoff, and Lorde (Allegedly)
popCulture.dek: Released April 14, 'Famesick' immediately hit No. 1 on Amazon after Dunham revealed Adam Driver threw a chair at her on the Girls set and she cheated on Jack Antonoff near the end of their relationship. The unnamed 'teen pop star' Antonoff got cozy with is very much a household name, and the internet has already done the math.

genZ.definition: A TikTok format where creators post carousels of slightly off-center, mid-sentence candid shots of their boyfriend, best friend, or pet — captioned 'me when I take FB mom photos of my ___' set to a piano-backed 'awww so cute' audio clip. It went massive this week because it perfectly names the thing everyone does but nobody admits to.
genZ.usage: Trump's press team taking candid shots of him waving at the blockade ships from the Oval Office: certified FB Mom Photos behavior.

tldr: Day 47 of the Iran war: the US blockade is biting, Trump says it's almost over, and Pakistan is once again stuck playing hall monitor between two nuclear-adjacent powers. On the home front, it's Tax Day — refunds are up, gas is expensive, and Lena Dunham is blowing up group chats nationwide.
